title: Allow ADD to use http src
body:
In #1977 we disallowed the use of a URL for both the
COPY and ADD commands in a Dockerfile.  Upon further
reflection we should have done that only for the COPY
command.

Addresses: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/4686

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:
FYI @edsantiago @mheon 
Need to test further to get WIP off this, I suspect some of the tests that were changed in #1977 won't be happy with this change.

I've removed the WIP, have reverted the tests to the way they used to be which is appropriate.  That includes a test with an "ADD {url}".  I'm kicking myself for not catching that removal in the prior PR.

:pushpin: Commit eada003 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan eada00381a724d4459bf82d292be3655e15c1b84 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
